channel.title: Python vs JavaScript on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Python vs JavaScript on simeononsecurity

item.title: Programming Languages to Learn First: A Developer's Guide
item.category: "best programming languages to learn first" , "which programming language should i learn" , "Python vs JavaScript" , "first coding language" , "programming language for beginners" , "what language to learn for software development"
item.description: Find out which programming languages to learn first based on your target role — web development, backend systems, data science, mobile, or security — with honest trade-off comparisons.
